item.title: Philippines: Tropical Cyclone - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Philippines
Glide: TC-2026-000150-PHL

Tropical cyclone with strong winds threatening the Visayas and Mindanao regions. Evacuation of coastal areas ongoing.

item.title: Nepal: Floods - July 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Nepal
Glide: FL-2026-000145-NPL

Heavy monsoon rains causing severe flooding in the Kathmandu Valley and surrounding districts. 12000 persons displaced, multiple villages inundated. Agricultural losses significant.

item.title: Indonesia: Earthquake - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Indonesia

M6.1 earthquake struck Java with moderate damage to buildings and infrastructure in Yogyakarta province.

item.title: Bangladesh: Floods - July 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Bangladesh
Glide: FL-2026-000140-BGD

Severe flooding in the Ganges delta affecting 8 districts with over 450000 persons affected. Houses destroyed, crops lost.
